name: BEN_LER_RL_F
description: BEN_LER_RL_F identifies one or more eligibility, document approval, and alert related rules to a life event for the purpose of determining a person's eligibility to participate, document approval setup for self reporting life events, and the alert setup respectively

columns.Name: LER_RL_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LER_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds foreign key to BEN_LER_F

columns.Name: RL_TYP_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds life event rule type

columns.Name: STATUS_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds life event rule status.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column holds life event rule Description

columns.Name: ELIGY_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_ELIGY_PRFL_F

columns.Name: SEQ_NUM
columns.Comments: Sequence Number for Eligibility

columns.Name: ELIG_REQD
columns.Comments: Eligibility required flag Y or N

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_DOCUMENT_TYPES_F

columns.Name: DOC_REQD
columns.Comments: This column holds document required flag Y or N

columns.Name: APPROVAL_REQD
columns.Comments: This column holds approval required flag Y or N

columns.Name: APPROVAL_ALERT_REQD
columns.Comments: Approval alert required flag Y or N

columns.Name: STAT_ANTHR_EVT_STRTD
columns.Comments: Status of potential life event if another life event is in started state. Manual or Unprocessed are possible values

columns.Name: ALERT_TYP_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds alert type code

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
